HomePage.title: Spark a Great Conversation
HomePage.subtitle: Choose a deck, shuffle the cards, and let the questions guide you to more meaningful and fun discussions.

ConversationPage.endSubtitle: Hope you had a great conversation.

DecksPage.title: All Decks
DecksPage.subtitle: Find the perfect set of questions for any occasion.

FavoritesPage.title: Favorite Decks
FavoritesPage.subtitle: Your hand-picked collection of conversation starters.
FavoritesPage.noFavoritesSubtitle: Click the star icon on any deck to add it to your favorites for quick access.

SettingsPage.title: Settings
SettingsPage.subtitle: Manage your app preferences and view information.
SettingsPage.appearanceSubtitle: Customize the look and feel of the app.
SettingsPage.pwaSubtitle: Connectivity status and offline usage information.
SettingsPage.offlineSubtitle: This app is a PWA (Progressive Web App). You can install it on your device for easy access and offline use. Deck data is synced for availability even without an internet connection.

Share.linkCopiedDescription: The link has been copied to your clipboard.
